violations.text: 1 door refrigerator was observed holding an ambient temperature of 50 DF. No TCS foods were in the unit at the time of inspection. No TCS foods are to be stored in unit until it is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or lower. Per PIC, refrigerator will be serviced today. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2024
The gasket for the reach in milk cooler was observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024

1 door refrigerator was observed held at 50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. All TCS foods in unit were observed between 50-52 DF. All TCS foods were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. No TCS foods are to be stored in unit until it is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or lower. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2024

Various sandwiches provided from an outside source was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024
The gasket for the reach in milk cooler was observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2024
